name: RFISI: Internal Connection with Botnet Command and Control
notes: This rule will notify when an internal host communicates with an IP known to be a botnet command and control server. Indicates that and internal infection is becoming active in a botnet. See https://ibm.biz/rfisi_threat_intel
conditions_text: when the context is Local to Remote
when any of Destination IP are contained in any of (Shared) Botnet C&C IPs - IP, (Shared) XFE ATPF-c2server_ipv4 - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY RFISI: Internal Connection with Botnet Command and Control on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the context is Local to Remote
AND when any of Destination IP are contained in any of (Shared) Botnet C&C IPs - IP, (Shared) XFE ATPF-c2server_ipv4 - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: RFISI: Internal Connection with Botnet Command and Control
Event description: An internal host is communicating with an IP known to be a botnet command and control server.
